verses.1: “Why aren’t times laid up by the Almighty?
verses.2: There are people who remove the landmarks.
verses.3: They drive away the donkey of the fatherless,
verses.4: They turn the needy out of the way.
verses.5: Behold, as wild donkeys in the desert,
verses.6: They cut their food in the field.
verses.7: They lie all night naked without clothing,
verses.8: They are wet with the showers of the mountains,
verses.9: There are those who pluck the fatherless from the breast,
verses.10: so that they go around naked without clothing.
verses.11: They make oil within the walls of these men.
verses.12: From out of the populous city, men groan.
verses.13: “These are of those who rebel against the light.
verses.14: The murderer rises with the light.
verses.15: The eye also of the adulterer waits for the twilight,
verses.16: In the dark they dig through houses.
verses.17: For the morning is to all of them like thick darkness,
verses.18: “They are foam on the surface of the waters.
verses.19: Drought and heat consume the snow waters,
verses.21: He devours the barren who don’t bear.
verses.22: Yet God preserves the mighty by his power.
verses.23: God gives them security, and they rest in it.
verses.24: They are exalted; yet a little while, and they are gone.
verses.25: If it isn’t so now, who will prove me a liar,
